series_metadata.series_description: Files contain information on Bureau of Underground Storage Tank Regulations (BUSTR) underground storage tank (UST)compliance inspections that include, but are not limited to the following items: COM5220 (BUSTR Compliance Inspection Report), COM 5220a (BUSTR Supplemental Report), Request for UST information (RUSTI), COM5221a (Notice of UST Violation), and COM5221b (Expedited Notice of UST Violation). The inspection file will also contain several other miscellaneous documents, such as leak detection records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: original in office permanently or file is converted a machine readable format ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable record permanently. ; Paper: compliance inspection files in operating area or storage files are assigned a ‘closed’ status. Upon being assigned a ‘closed’ status, file will be converted a machine readable format
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
